key_evidence: April 14, 2026 layoffs of ~1,000 employees with explicit AI-efficiency rationale (CEO D'Amaro memo); $95-130M restructuring charge; entire teams eliminated at Hulu/FX/ESPN/ABC News marketing and home-entertainment/EPK; 8% of Marvel RIF'd.
Severance package (4-month + prorated bonus + health continuation) is above sector median — prevents Critical-band drop but does not offset EMP/INT signal of AI-rationale framing.
F500 DEI disclosures fell 65% in 2026 sector-wide; Disney has not published 2025 DEI demographic report (historical ROWE reports discontinued).
2025 Disneyland $233M wage-theft settlement is substantive AB5/ACC repair, though court-forced.
Orlando UNITE HERE contract through Oct 2026 provides structural EMP/EQU floor.
watch_items: Re-employment rates among laid-off workers (90-day window)
Whether D'Amaro administration publishes 2025 diversity demographics
